+{"id":"frankenredis-3mga","title":"Freeze AOF SELECT boundary propagation order","description":"FR-P2C-005 Stage D7 / C03 / U003: extend runtime AOF replay-visible propagation tests so DB boundary SELECT records and write command order are mechanically frozen. The test should prove a multi-DB command sequence emits SELECT before the first write in each DB, does not add redundant SELECT records for same-DB writes, and replays into matching DB-scoped state.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T06:40:05.040083476Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T06:54:54.331516749Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T06:54:54.329657088Z","close_reason":"Completed AOF SELECT boundary propagation order coverage; validated via rch fmt/check/clippy/focused runtime test and UBS","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","persistence","phase2c","upstream-parity"]}

 {"id":"frankenredis-42df","title":"Add redis-cli compatibility smoke test script","description":"# redis-cli Compatibility Smoke Test

## What
A shell script that starts FrankenRedis, runs redis-cli commands against it, and verifies outputs. This is the ultimate "drop-in replacement" proof.

## Why
If redis-cli cannot talk to FrankenRedis, it is not a drop-in replacement regardless of what internal tests say.

## Implementation
1. scripts/redis_cli_smoke_test.sh
2. Start frankenredis on a random port
3. Run redis-cli commands:
   - PING → PONG
   - SET foo bar → OK
   - GET foo → bar
   - INFO server → contains "redis_version"
   - DBSIZE → (integer) 1
   - CONFIG GET maxmemory → valid response
   - MULTI/EXEC transaction
   - EVAL "return redis.call(\"GET\",KEYS[1])" 1 foo → bar
4. Check exit code of each command
5. Clean up

## Depends On
- redis-cli must be installed (check and skip if not available)

## Files
- scripts/redis_cli_smoke_test.sh (new)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-07T03:12:21.374165839Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-07T20:12:07.348902310Z","closed_at":"2026-04-07T20:12:07.348633631Z","close_reason":"Added scripts/redis_cli_smoke_test.sh: 25 tests covering PING, SET/GET, APPEND, EXISTS, DEL, INCR/INCRBY, RPUSH/LLEN/LPOP, HSET/HGET, SADD/SISMEMBER/SCARD, INFO, DBSIZE, EVAL, CONFIG GET. All 25/25 pass using legacy redis-cli against FrankenRedis.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
